scripts.deploy:functions: npm run build --workspace=backend/functions && npx --yes --package=firebase-tools@15.22.4 firebase deploy --only functions --project serviceverse-dev-fa38e
scripts.deploy:rules:firestore: unset GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS; npx --yes --package=firebase-tools@15.22.4 firebase deploy --only firestore:rules --project serviceverse-dev-fa38e
scripts.deploy:seedAdmin: npm run build --workspace=backend/functions && npx --yes --package=firebase-tools@15.22.4 firebase deploy --only functions:seedAdmin --project serviceverse-dev-fa38e
